def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    # Find all connected components
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    comps=[]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            if grid[sr][sc]!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]==bg: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c,grid[r][c]))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                if cells: comps.append(cells)
    if not comps: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    # Sort comps left-to-right by centroid
    comps.sort(key=lambda c: sum(cc for r,cc,v in c)//len(c))
    # Find the output height from the tallest comp
    H=max(max(r for r,c,v in comp)-min(r for r,c,v in comp)+1 for comp in comps)
    total_w=sum(max(c for r,c,v in comp)-min(c for r,c,v in comp)+1 for comp in comps)
    out=[[bg]*total_w for _ in range(H)]
    offset=0
    for comp in comps:
        r0=min(r for r,c,v in comp); c0=min(c for r,c,v in comp)
        for r,c,v in comp: out[r-r0][c-c0+offset]=v
        offset+=max(c for r,c,v in comp)-c0+1
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    comps=[]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            if grid[sr][sc]!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]==bg: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c,grid[r][c]))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                if cells: comps.append(cells)
    if not comps: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    # Group comps that are close together (same cluster)
    # Sort by top-left corner
    comps.sort(key=lambda c: (min(r for r,cc,v in c), min(cc for r,cc,v in c)))
    # Find the vertical connector comp (one that spans multiple rows only)
    vert_comp=None; horiz_comps=[]
    for comp in comps:
        rs=set(r for r,c,v in comp); cs=set(c for r,c,v in comp)
        if len(rs)>len(cs)*1.5: vert_comp=comp
        else: horiz_comps.append(comp)
    # Assemble: vert_comp on left, then horiz_comps in order
    parts=([vert_comp] if vert_comp else []) + (horiz_comps if not vert_comp else horiz_comps)
    H=max(max(r for r,c,v in p)-min(r for r,c,v in p)+1 for p in parts)
    total_w=sum(max(c for r,c,v in p)-min(c for r,c,v in p)+1 for p in parts)
    out=[[bg]*total_w for _ in range(H)]
    offset=0
    for comp in parts:
        r0=min(r for r,c,v in comp); c0=min(c for r,c,v in comp)
        for r,c,v in comp: out[r-r0][c-c0+offset]=v
        offset+=max(c for r,c,v in comp)-c0+1
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    # Find the rectangular cluster of shapes
    non_bg=[(r,c,grid[r][c]) for r in range(R) for c in range(C) if grid[r][c]!=bg]
    if not non_bg: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    r0=min(r for r,c,v in non_bg); r1=max(r for r,c,v in non_bg)
    c0=min(c for r,c,v in non_bg); c1=max(c for r,c,v in non_bg)
    out=[[bg]*(c1-c0+1) for _ in range(r1-r0+1)]
    for r,c,v in non_bg: out[r-r0][c-c0]=v
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    comps=[]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            if grid[sr][sc]!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]==bg: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c,grid[r][c]))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                if cells: comps.append(cells)
    if not comps: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    # The output height = height of largest comp, width = sum of all comp widths
    comps.sort(key=lambda c: min(cc for r,cc,v in c))
    H=max(max(r for r,c,v in comp)-min(r for r,c,v in comp)+1 for comp in comps)
    parts=[]
    for comp in comps:
        r0=min(r for r,c,v in comp); c0=min(c for r,c,v in comp)
        r1=max(r for r,c,v in comp); c1=max(c for r,c,v in comp)
        h=r1-r0+1; w=c1-c0+1
        patch=[[bg]*w for _ in range(h)]
        for r,c,v in comp: patch[r-r0][c-c0]=v
        parts.append(patch)
    total_w=sum(len(p[0]) for p in parts)
    out=[[bg]*total_w for _ in range(H)]
    offset=0
    for part in parts:
        for r in range(len(part)):
            for c in range(len(part[0])):
                if part[r][c]!=bg: out[r][c+offset]=part[r][c]
        offset+=len(part[0])
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    comps=[]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            if grid[sr][sc]!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]==bg: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c,grid[r][c]))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                if cells: comps.append(cells)
    if not comps: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    comps.sort(key=lambda c: (min(r for r,cc,v in c), min(cc for r,cc,v in c)))
    # Stitch all comps into a single row using bounding boxes
    H=max(max(r for r,c,v in comp)-min(r for r,c,v in comp)+1 for comp in comps)
    parts=[]
    for comp in comps:
        r0=min(r for r,c,v in comp); c0=min(c for r,c,v in comp)
        c1=max(c for r,c,v in comp); r1=max(r for r,c,v in comp)
        p=[[bg]*(c1-c0+1) for _ in range(r1-r0+1)]
        for r,c,v in comp: p[r-r0][c-c0]=v
        # Pad to H rows
        while len(p)<H: p.append([bg]*len(p[0]))
        parts.append(p)
    W=sum(len(p[0]) for p in parts)
    out=[[bg]*W for _ in range(H)]
    offset=0
    for p in parts:
        for r in range(H):
            for c in range(len(p[0])): out[r][c+offset]=p[r][c]
        offset+=len(p[0])
    return out

def transform(grid):
    return [list(r) for r in grid]
